name: Wargaming
description: 3D miniatures and vehicles for tabletop battles. Includes trenches, fantasy, sci-fi, historical, and vehicles.

name: RPG
description: Heroes, monsters, NPCs, and mounts for role-playing games. Covers player characters, monsters & bosses, familiars, and vehicles

name: Terrain
description: 3D landscapes and environments for boards or dioramas. Includes dungeons, wilderness, urban areas, and sci-fi/starships.

name: Bases
description: Platforms and display pegs for miniatures. Features round/oval, square/rectangular, and scenic toppers.

name: Bits and Modkits
description: Custom parts and accessories to modify miniatures. Includes weapons, helmets, effects, and modular pieces.

name: Trench
description: 3D models of trenches, fortifications, and battlefield defenses for tabletop wargames.

name: Fantasy
description: Fantasy-themed miniatures including warriors, creatures, and scenery for wargames.

name: Sci-Fi
description: Futuristic miniatures, vehicles, and battle units for science fiction wargames.

name: Historical
description: 3D models based on real-world armies, weapons, and vehicles from historical eras.

name: Vehicles
description: Tanks, mechs, and other 3D vehicles designed for tabletop wargaming.

name: Player Characters
description: 3D printable heroes and adventurers for tabletop RPG campaigns.

name: NPCs
description: Non-player character miniatures to enrich RPG sessions and encounters.

name: Monsters and Bosses
description: Detailed 3D monsters and boss creatures for epic RPG battles.

name: Familiars and Summons
description: 3D miniatures of pets, spirits, and summoned creatures for RPG games.

name: Mounts and Vehicles
description: Creatures and transport models for RPG heroes and campaigns.

name: Dungeons and Interiors
description: 3D printable rooms, corridors, and furniture for dungeon setups.

name: Wilderness and Ruins
description: Natural landscapes, ruins, and outdoor terrain for immersive scenes.

name: Urban and Industrial
description: 3D cityscapes, factories, and urban environments for tabletop terrain.

name: Sci Fi and Starships
description: Spaceships, bases, and futuristic structures for sci-fi settings.

name: Round and Oval
description: 3D round and oval bases for displaying tabletop miniatures.

name: Square and Rectangular
description: Square and rectangular base models for miniatures and wargaming units.

name: Scenic Toppers
description: Decorative 3D toppers to enhance miniature bases and scenes.

name: Weapons and Arms
description: 3D weapons and arm components for miniature customization.

name: Heads and Helmets
description: Alternative heads and helmets to modify miniatures.

name: Accessories and Effects
description: Extra 3D accessories, effects, and props for detailed builds.

name: Modular Parts
description: Modular 3D pieces and kits for converting and assembling miniatures.
